label: Painted Plaster

materialPalette.wall: limewashed plaster walls with colored trim and exposed timber ends
materialPalette.floor: worn plank floors with painted threshold boards
materialPalette.trim: blue shutters, hanging signs, and small awnings
materialPalette.accent: framed paintings, dye crates, notice boards, barrels, and work desks

notes: Use when a settlement needs color and civic life without becoming a stone city.
Pair with market or townhouse forms so the plaster reads as a local material choice, not a one-off gimmick.
